rationale: Educ. Code §29.088 governs after-school and summer math programs and their funding process. It contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no direct conflict exists.
quote: A program provided under this section shall be paid for with funds appropriated for that purpose.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district appropriations is possible but not a statutory conflict under this section.
